instruction:
The derivative of the implicit function \( y = y(x) \) determined by the equation \( x^2 + y^2 + xy = 0 \) is \( \frac{dy}{dx} \) =

Options:
A. \\( -\\frac{2x - y}{2y + x} \\)
B. \(\frac{2y - x}{2x + y} \)
C. \(\frac{2y - x}{2x - y} \)
D. \( - rac{2y + x}{2x + y} \)
E. \(\frac{2x - y}{2y + x} \)
F. \( -\frac{2x + y}{2y + x} \)
G. \(\frac{2x - y}{2y - x} \)
H. \(-\frac{2x - y}{2y - x} \)
I. \(  rac{2x + y}{2y + x} \)
J. \(  rac{2y + x}{2x + y} \)
